form.formComment: Last outing finished 11th of 16 starters at Auteuil in the LR on March 28 over 3900m, 37 len behind Dixan Senora carrying 69.5kg at $17. Start before finished fifth of 15 runners at Auteuil in the LR on March 7 over 3900m, on slow going 13 len behind Kirikou Des Mers carrying 68kg at $33. Not the worst. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Freshened for 44 days. Last start finished second of 13 starters at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 3800m, 3 len behind Magneto with 67kg. Run before made ground from midfield; finished fourth of 11 runners at Angers on February 12 over 4100m, 9 len behind Caligramme carrying 70kg at $12. Thereabouts last couple but will need to improve further to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last campaign 5 of 15 runners at Pau January 20 over 4700m, in the wet; 19 len behind Jaguar Du Large with 69.5kg at $8.60. Previously first up; 5 of 9 starters at this track October 15 over 4300m, slow track; 4.5 len behind Majestika with 70kg at $8.30. Likely to feature.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign winning won by 0.8 len Auteuil LR March 31 2024 over 4400m in the wet defeating Caligramme with 69kg at $6.60. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.0 len Pau January 6 2024 over 3800m on heavy track defeating Cosmos Harmony carrying 68kg at $3.60. Has switched stables to the Guillaume Lassaussaye yard.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 61 days. Fresh up after two months pulled up at Angers on February 12 over 4100m. Previously second-up finished fifth of 13 runners at Auteuil on October 12 over 3700m, slow track; 10 len behind File Au Poteau with 66kg at $10. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Resumes off a 43 day letup. Last outing won by 1.3 len Compiegne on March 2 over 3450m defeating Lady Ange Win carrying 69.5kg at $8.50 in a steeplechase. The start before that; won by 0.8 len Cagnes-sur-Mer on January 4 over 3500m on rain affected going defeating Dabasir with 68kg at $2.10 in a hurdle. Rates well. Must be included.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign 4 of 17 runners at Compiegne April 22 over 3800m, slow track; 1.4 len behind Fan D'apple's carrying 72kg at $11. When resuming last campaign 5 in a small field at Compiegne March 12 2025 over 3850m, 9 len behind Kamaro D'huez with 71kg at $18. Capable and looks an each way chance in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resumes. Finished off last campaign 4 of 17 runners at Compiegne April 22 over 3800m, slow track; 1.4 len behind Fan D'apple's carrying 72kg at $11. form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming finished third of 9 starters at Maure-de-Bretagne on February 22 over 4200m, on rain affected going; 11 len behind Parkatthetheatre carrying 68kg. Second-up came from midfield and won by a head Durtal on March 22 over 4000m defeating Hunbeur carrying 68kg in a steeplechase. Fitter now and making headway every start. Improved sharply to score by a head in a steeplechase (4000m) at Durtal at the latest outing.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after four months finished second of 7 runners at Bordeaux on March 10 over 3800m, 3.5 len behind Funway carrying 67kg at $4.40. Previously second-up finished second in a small field at Bordeaux on October 21 over 3800m, on slow going 1.3 len behind Goliador with 67kg at $2.50. Leading contender and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after five months finished third of 10 starters at La Teste De Buch on April 1 over 3900m, 12 len behind Le Kerry carrying 69kg at $10. Despite the good recent form run rates a place chance only in this line-up.
